name: startup-idea-validation
description: Agent skill for startup idea validation using a 9-dimension framework covering problem severity, market sizing, timing, competitive moats, unit economics, founder-market fit, feasibility, GTM clarity, and risk profile.
readme_summary: Strong validation scorecard and experiment ladder. Useful for idea validation after an opportunity has been found, but it is not primarily a multi-source opportunity discovery or prior-art coverage skill.

name: ailabs-393/ai-labs-claude-skills@startup-validator
description: Startup validator skill triggered by requests to validate startup ideas, analyze market opportunity, research competition, evaluate business ideas, or check demand.
readme_summary: Useful validation workflow candidate. Public listing emphasizes idea viability and demand checks rather than source coverage confidence or multi-platform opportunity discovery.

name: majiayu000/claude-arsenal@product-discovery
description: Product discovery skill focused on continuous discovery, outcomes, assumption testing, co-creation, data-driven decisions, and problem-first thinking.
readme_summary: Good product discovery doctrine. Borrow problem-first and assumption-testing patterns, but it is broader PM workflow rather than a search-backed opportunity discovery gate.

name: thim81/ost-builder@opportunity-solution-tree-builder
description: Skill for creating Opportunity Solution Trees in structured Markdown with outcomes, opportunities, solutions, experiments, and visualization support.
readme_summary: Useful output format for organizing opportunities after discovery. It does not appear to search the web, GitHub, or communities for new opportunity candidates.

name: nweii/agent-stuff@validating-startup-ideas
description: Skill for finding and validating startup ideas by mining user complaints, crafting premises, and navigating the idea maze.
readme_summary: Closest skill-language overlap around mining complaints and finding ideas. Needs source inspection before adoption; public listing suggests useful complaint-mining workflow.

name: onvoyage-ai/gtm-engineer-skills@reddit-opportunity-research
description: Skill candidate for Reddit opportunity research and community-signal mining.
readme_summary: Useful source-specific adapter pattern for community pain discovery. It should be integrated as one signal route rather than treated as a complete opportunity discovery system.

name: ferdinandobons/startup-skill
description: AI agent skills for startup validation, competitive intelligence, and planning.
readme_summary: High-overlap public skill repository. Strong candidate to inspect for modular startup validation and competitive intelligence patterns before building a new business-opportunity skill.

name: Nirikshan95/VettIQ
description: AI-powered startup idea validation tool using LangGraph workflows, FastAPI, and Streamlit to deliver actionable insights for entrepreneurs.
readme_summary: Application implementation candidate. Useful for validation workflow, LangGraph structure, and entrepreneur-facing reports, but less directly reusable as a cross-agent skill.

name: Pranavharshans/ThinkTank-AI
description: AI-powered startup idea validator that analyzes market trends, feasibility, customer personas, business models, and investor readiness.
readme_summary: Good benchmark for broad validation dimensions. Unknown license limits direct reuse.

name: mxvsh/prove
description: Local-first startup idea validator that runs a structured AI conversation across five stages and produces a verdict.
readme_summary: Useful local-first and verdict framing. It validates an input idea more than it discovers opportunities from source coverage.

name: igr290/XHS_Business_Idea_Validator
description: Analyze Xiaohongshu data to uncover market opportunities and user needs, generating automated reports for business idea validation.
readme_summary: Important China-platform signal source. Strong borrow candidate for Xiaohongshu-specific opportunity detection, but direct reuse needs license and data-access review.

name: codechan-dev/ai-business-validator
description: AI-powered business idea validator using LangGraph workflows, Groq LLM reasoning, and MCP tools for market research, competitor analysis, demand validation, and feasibility scoring.
readme_summary: Good implementation reference for MCP-backed market research and feasibility scoring.

name: bhagwadG/oda
readme_summary: Name-level match. Needs source inspection because public metadata is sparse.

name: OSSIdeas
description: Product that analyzes trending open-source repositories to discover, validate, and launch open-source startup ideas with monetization and competitive insights.
readme_summary: Product-level competitor for opportunity discovery from GitHub/open-source signals. Useful positioning comparison; not directly adoptable as a skill.

name: Fulcrum
description: AI-powered data intelligence product where autonomous agents scan Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub Issues, RSS feeds, and Twitter for raw signals of unmet demand, then extract, validate, and score product opportunities.
readme_summary: Closest product positioning to the proposed skill: multi-source opportunity discovery with validation and scoring. Useful competitive positioning reference, not a reusable open skill.
